⏺ Update(run/tests)
  ⎿  Added 11 lines, removed 2 linesdax
       1  #!/usr/bin/env bash
       2 -# run/tests — execute the full Deno unit-t
         -est suite.
       2 +# run/tests — execute the full Deno unit-t
         +est suite and regenerate
       3 +# snapshot fixtures (e.g. the peek TUI ren
         +derer goldens).
       4  #
       5  # Resolves the repo root relative to this
          script so it works regardless
       6  # of the caller's CWD. `deno test tests/`
          doesn't discover files in
       7  # this layout (names don't end in _test.ts
          /.js), so we glob explicitly.
       8 +#
       9 +# After running, check `git status` / `git
         + diff tests/fixtures/` — any
      10 +# change there is a snapshot diff that nee
         +ds human review before commit.
      11
      12  set -euo pipefail
      13
     ...
      15  repo="$(cd "$here/.." && pwd)"
      16  cd "$repo"
      17
      14 -exec deno test --allow-all tests/*.js "$@"
      18 +echo "==> deno unit tests"
      19 +deno test --allow-all tests/*.js "$@"
      20 +
      21 +echo
      22 +echo "==> regenerating peek TUI fixtures"
      23 +deno run --allow-read --allow-write tests/
         +fixtures/peek/generate.js

⏺ Bash(./run/tests 2>&1 | tail -30)
  ⎿  Running…
